quoteLast: , and be in London about 9 P.M.
title: The Disentanglers
author: Lang, Andrew, 1844-1912

quoteFirst: I anxiously waited the dawn of day; when, being on the starboard    tack, Cape St. Vincent bearing E.N.E. eight leagues, I had the    satisfaction of seeing a number of ships extended from S.W. to    S., the wind then W. by S. At
quoteLast: , the    weather being extremely hazy, La Bonne Citoyenne made the signal    that the ships seen were of the line, twenty-five in number.
title: Memoirs and Correspondence of Admiral Lord de Saumarez, Vol. I
author: Ross, John, Sir, 1777-1856
